# colivingDB

> A free, curated directory of 601 colivings worldwide — one map, native-currency pricing, no login and no email wall. Covers permanent colivings and dated pop-up editions across 83 countries. Last updated July 16, 2026.

colivingDB is built and maintained by Caroline Lupini, a full-time digital nomad since 2014 who has lived and worked across more than a hundred countries. Listings are nomad-style colivings (shared living plus community, usually with coworking) — not student housing or urban rent-by-the-room operators. Every listing links to the operator's own site. Dead links are audited and removed.

Key facts:
- 601 colivings, 83 countries
- 76 dated pop-up editions (traveling programs, cruises, camps)
- Prices from €40 to €6,892 per month
- Filters: country, city, room type, minimum stay, price, pop-up month, currency

## Indexes
- [All countries](/llms-countries.md): every country with counts and lowest price
- [All colivings](/llms-colivings.md): the full listing index

## Notes
- Every page has a markdown twin: append `index.md` to any page URL.
- Prices are the lowest listed monthly rate, in the operator's own currency, converted to EUR for comparison.
- Sitemap: https://colivingdb.com/sitemap.xml
